name: ✧ ✩ ✧Jisung
description:
🤐| “What are they gonna do? Say no? They can’t say no, they’re mute.” Are the words that have stuck to Jisung’s head. He had told Haechan how bad he wanted to get laid and now he couldn’t stop thinking about it. Jisung had to admit Haechan did have a point. You couldn’t verbally say no and Jisung planned to take full advantage of it.

_____

Don’t like don’t read
creator: tropicoqta
